<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Discover Email settings"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/autoconfig"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Try to discover IMAP and SMTP settings for an email account

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"x-ee-timeout","in":"header","schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Request timeout in milliseconds (overrides EENGINE_TIMEOUT environment variable)","minimum":0,"maximum":7200000},"description":"Request timeout in milliseconds (overrides EENGINE_TIMEOUT environment variable)"},{"name":"email","in":"query","schema":{"type":"string","description":"Email address to discover email settings for","example":"sender@example.com","x-format":{"email":true}},"description":"Email address to discover email settings for","required":true}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"imap":{"type":"object","properties":{"auth":{"type":"object","properties":{"user":{"type":"string","description":"Account username","example":"myuser@gmail.com","maxLength":256}},"title":"DetectedAuthenticationInfo"},"host":{"type":"string","description":"Hostname to connect to","example":"imap.gmail.com","x-format":{"hostname":true}},"port":{"type":"integer","description":"Service port number","example":993,"minimum":1,"maximum":65536},"secure":{"type":"boolean","description":"Should connection use TLS. Usually true for port 993","example":true,"default":false}},"required":["host","port"],"title":"ResolvedServerSettings"},"smtp":{"type":"object","properties":{"auth":{"type":"object","properties":{"user":{"type":"string","description":"Account username","example":"myuser@gmail.com","maxLength":256}},"title":"DetectedAuthenticationInfo"},"host":{"type":"string","description":"Hostname to connect to","example":"imap.gmail.com","x-format":{"hostname":true}},"port":{"type":"integer","description":"Service port number","example":993,"minimum":1,"maximum":65536},"secure":{"type":"boolean","description":"Should connection use TLS. Usually true for port 993","example":true,"default":false}},"required":["host","port"],"title":"DiscoveredServerSettings"},"_source":{"type":"string","description":"Source for the detected info","example":"srv"}},"title":"DiscoveredEmailSettings"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
